name: @blackbelt-technology/anti-slop-frontend
description: Pi skill — a mechanical, countable anti-slop checklist for AI-generated frontend. Catches the specific tells an undirected model defaults to (AI-purple, Inter-everywhere, em-dashes, div-based fake screenshots, eyebrow-per-section, Jane Doe / Acme data). Advisory; pairs with frontend-mockup-loop. Works in any React/Tailwind/HTML project.
